q: Do you want to visit an art gallery or museum?
examiner_note: Nói về kế hoạch hoặc mong muốn. Sử dụng 'iconic works', 'travel list', 'immersive experience'.

band7.text: Absolutely. In fact, I have a few specific museums on my travel list, like the Louvre in Paris. I think seeing iconic works of art in person is a completely different experience than seeing them in books or online.
band7.note: Sử dụng ví dụ cụ thể (Louvre) và so sánh tốt (in person vs online).

band8.text: Definitely. I’m always eager to explore new galleries and museums. I find that seeing the scale and texture of a piece of art in reality provides a much more profound and memorable experience. It’s something I always try to incorporate into my travel itineraries.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng hay (eager, scale, texture, profound, incorporate, itineraries).

band9.text: I’m constantly seeking out opportunities to visit renowned art institutions. There’s an undeniable power in standing before a masterpiece and experiencing its emotional impact firsthand. For me, visiting a museum is not just a leisure activity, but an essential part of my cultural and intellectual growth.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng ở mức độ cao (renowned, masterpiece, firsthand, institutional, intellectual growth).

v.example: We have a very busy itinerary for our trip.
The Mona Lisa is a world-famous masterpiece.

advanced_vocab.example: I saw the impact of the storm firsthand.

similar_questions: What is the most interesting museum you have ever visited?
Why do people go to museums?
